result.reasoning: The user asks for the title of Chapter 2 of the book that the introduction quote in ISBN 9780472902903 is sourced from. From the tool call history: step 1 identifies the book with that ISBN as "Creating Chaos Online: Disinformation and Subverted Post-Publics" and provides the introduction quote. Step 2 shows the exact quote, attributed to Milburn, 1998. Step 3 identifies the source book as "The Politics of Denial" by Michael A. Milburn and Sheree D. Conrad. Step 4 retrieves the Chapter 2 title of that book as "No, really, I’m fine". Step 5 cleans the title by excluding the "Chapter 2:" prefix. The title is provided with specific capitalization and punctuation in the source. I preserve the exact casing, spacing, and punctuation from the authoritative source text in step 4. Applied casing rule: preserved exact casing from authoritative source.
